text: {"ai_response":"B40 is the Department of Statistics' classification for households earning under RM 5,250 per month. Yayasan UM uses this band for need-based eligibility, so if your household income is in B40 you'll qualify for the need-based pathway. The income figure on your EPF statement (which you uploaded on Step 3) is what we'll use for verification — your typed declaration on Step 1 is the initial signal.","suggest_escalate":false,"escalation_summary":null}
